  • Method Details

    • getSocketAddress

      public String getSocketAddress()
      gets the socket address of the client based of the InetAddress and port from toServer. formatted like address:port
      Returns:
      returns socket address based off InetAddress and Port

    • run

      public void run()
      Client runnable Contains threads for WebHandler, InputHandler, ResponseHandler
      Throws:
      Exception - throws exception if the webhandler doesnt run

    • close

      public void close()
      closes the toServer socket
      Throws:
      IOException - throws exception if it cant close the socket

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage(String message, boolean isWhisper)
      outputs a message through the socket after checking for its intended reciever
      Parameters:
      message - the message string
      isWhisper - boolean. tags are added to the end of the message. to whisper add '````*tag*' to the end of a message. if not whispered it auto adds '0000' to send to all

    • checkMessage

      public void checkMessage(String message)
      checks the message for banned words and commands Calls the censorMessage function to filter banned words Checks message for any commands, and executes them if so
      Parameters:
      message - the message string

    • getPage

      public String getPage()
      gets the input from the server
      Returns:
      returns page from input strems, returns null if it cant read the input stream
      Throws:
      IOexception - input error

    • getBrowserPort

      public int getBrowserPort()
      gets a port for the browser, iterates until it finds a free one
      Returns:
      a valid port
